title: Senior devs flee big tech’s process tax
meta_description: Senior devs quit big tech for 60% less approval friction — latency, cost, and on-call data from 2026 benchmarks show why.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $72k/year on slow approvals before measuring ROI.

The real reason senior devs quit isn’t money — it’s waiting 48 hours to ship a flag.
